prompt: Write an Adams CMD script to create a simple pendulum. It should have a single rigid link of length 200 mm and mass 1 kg, pinned to the ground at its top end by a revolute joint, with gravity acting in the -Y direction. Release it from 45 degrees.
assertions: Script contains a model create command
A rigid body part is created with part create rigid_body
At least one marker is created on the link and at least one on ground
A revolute joint is created using constraint create joint revolute with i_marker_name and j_marker_name
A gravity field is created with gravity_field_name and a negative Y component
Initial orientation is set to 45 degrees (or 45D)
All keywords are spelled out in full (no abbreviated forms like PART or CONST)
